name: CyberVault - Zero-Knowledge Credential Manager
description: Gestor de credenciales Zero-Knowledge con 4 capas de encriptación y monitoreo de vulnerabilidades

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.pwnedpasswords.com https://otx.alienvault.com https://api.github.com https://*; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none';
